mapper.select:
SELECT gv.row_type, gv.node_id, gv.parent_id,
gv.project_code, gv.project_name, gv.created_on, gv.completed_on, gv.project_status,
gv.type_code, gv.type_name, gv.type_level, gv.par_type_code, gv.par_type_name,
gv.issue_code, gv.par_issue_code, gv.title, gv.priority, gv.issue_status, gv.progress, gv.assignee_code, gv.assignee_name, gv.created_at, gv.started_at, gv.due_at, gv.resolved_at,
vpp.actual_prog, vpp.plan_prog FROM gantt_view gv LEFT JOIN VW_PROJECT_PROGRESS vpp ON gv.project_code = vpp.project_code ORDER BY gv.project_code, gv.row_type DESC, gv.type_level NULLS FIRST, gv.node_id
